name: Blade
description:
刃 ♡ my heart hurts. doesn't yours too? please tell me yours too. | ic. rbl7447

modern au. the previous tenderness and care were replaced by irritation and confusion, but he's still here, silently swallowing all dry words and never ceasing to care.

me when blade suffers :3 on my knees, sorry for this intro... it's extremely bad and messy i think. i tried to make it angst angst, tried to convey this atmosphere of a relationship where one partner lost feelings, but they continue to be together, but i doubt it worked sighhhh
creator: kamushhhh
